money_flow_summary: Money flows from shippers (retailers, manufacturers) through freight brokers, carriers, and last-mile operators. 3PLs charge 15-30% on freight spend to coordinate the chain. AI disrupts the coordination and visibility layers — predicting delays, optimizing routes, and automating documentation — creating opportunities for solo operators who can build lightweight intelligence tools on top of existing carrier networks.

top_opportunities.title: Import/Export Compliance Document Automation
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI agent that handles the paperwork nightmare of international trade: auto-generates commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and customs declarations from order data. Cross-references HTS codes, tariff schedules, and country-specific requirements. Charge $199-$999/mo to SMB importers/exporters. Customs brokers charge $150-$500 per shipment for the same work.
top_opportunities.moat: HTS classification database and country-specific rule library creates proprietary accuracy advantage
top_opportunities.first_step: Build HTS tariff schedule parser + commercial invoice generator; test with 5 Shopify/Amazon sellers who import from China; post in ecommerce importing Facebook groups
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI classifies products into HTS codes, determines applicable tariffs, and generates compliant customs documentation — tasks that require specialist training and take hours manually

top_opportunities.title: SMB Demand Forecasting & Reorder Automation
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Connect to Shopify/WooCommerce + the seller's suppliers (via EDI or email). Analyze 12-24 months of sales velocity by SKU, seasonal patterns, and lead times. Auto-generate purchase orders when stock hits reorder point, factoring in upcoming promotions and forecasted demand. Charge $149-$499/mo. Stockouts cost SMBs 4-8% of annual revenue on average.
top_opportunities.moat: Historical sales + inventory data creates proprietary demand model per customer; supplier integrations deepen lock-in
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Shopify inventory data connector; implement SARIMA or Prophet forecasting model; create demo showing stockout prevention for 3 test products
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI incorporates external signals (weather, social trends, promotional calendars) into demand forecasts that simple velocity-based reorder rules miss completely

top_opportunities.title: Freight Rate Comparison & Carrier Selection AI
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool that connects to ShipBob, ShipStation, UPS, FedEx, and USPS APIs. When a shipper enters package dimensions and destination, AI compares all rates in real-time, recommends the optimal carrier, books the shipment, and generates labels. Take a small margin on each label ($0.10-$0.50) or charge $49-$199/mo subscription to high-volume shippers.
top_opportunities.moat: Volume-based carrier discounts improve with scale; shipping history creates ROI reporting that creates retention
top_opportunities.first_step: Integrate UPS, FedEx, USPS rate APIs; build comparison UI; launch on Shopify App Store as a free tier app
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI optimizes carrier selection considering not just price but delivery speed reliability, dimensional weight rules, and zone-based pricing — saving 15-40% vs default carrier selection
